scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:frontend && npm run copy:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install --build-from-source=@tensorflow/tfjs-node
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=$NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL npm run build && npm run export
scripts.copy:frontend: rm -rf backend/public && mkdir -p backend/public && cp -r frontend/out/* backend/public/
scripts.build:static: cd frontend && npm install && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=$NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL npm run build && npm run export
scripts.start:backend: cd backend && PORT=3001 npm run start:prod
